title: Demon Protocol
description:
Lock On. Light Up. Lay Waste.

The demons are coming. Are you ready?

Demon Protocol is a fast-paced retro arcade shooter that puts you in the cockpit of humanity's last line of defense. Battle through 25 waves of increasingly deadly enemies, collect power-ups to turn the tide, and face down 4 fearsome bosses that will test everything you've got.

Features:

• 25 waves of intense arcade action

• 4 unique boss encounters

• Power-up system to enhance your firepower and survivability

• Multiple difficulty settings — pick your challenge

• Pulsing original soundtrack

• Controller and keyboard support

• Classic arcade feel with modern polish

Lock On. Light Up. Lay Waste. How far can you go before Demon Protocol claims you?
description_short: Lock On. Light Up. Lay Waste. Demon Protocol is a retro arcade space shooter with 25 waves of relentless enemies, 4 brutal bosses, and power-ups to keep you fighting. Choose your difficulty and see how far you can push before the demons win.
